Build the default segment adapter backed by the runtime's fallback segmenter.

## Import

```ts
import { createDefaultSegmentAdapter } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function createDefaultSegmentAdapter(): SegmentAdapter
```

## Returns

A fresh default segment adapter.

## Example

```ts
createDefaultSegmentAdapter();
```
